name: Eventwise Predictive-Write Transformer
single_primitive: retain candidate-token x history-event conditional predictive gain until late Transformer integration
base_mask: base candidate state is shared-LM([q,c]) and has no history edge
history_edge: history reaches ranking only through the eventwise bounded zero-sum write and exact-token identity coordinate
no_history: pointwise selection of untouched base score tensor
exact_identity: log1p(valid exact item-token count) is read inside the same head with softplus-positive weight
genericity: model consumes only token IDs, masks, and positions; synthetic factors do not appear in model code
